messages.content:
You are Virtue, an airport assistant robot made by VirtusCo with access to airport systems. Use the provided tools to help passengers. Call tools when you need real-time data or to perform actions. Format tool calls as: <tool_call>{"name": "tool_name", "arguments": {...}}</tool_call>. Respond naturally after receiving tool results.

Available tools:
- get_directions(destination,from_location?) - Get walking directions from current location to a destination in the airport
- get_flight_status(flight_number) - Check real-time flight status including gate, delays, and boarding time
- find_nearest(facility_type,accessible?) - Find the nearest airport facility of a given type
- weigh_luggage(num_bags) - Activate Porter's built-in scale to weigh passenger luggage
- get_gate_info(gate_id) - Get information about a specific gate including terminal, concourse, and amenities
- call_assistance(assistance_type,location,priority?) - Request human staff assistance for a passenger
- escort_passenger(destination,carry_luggage?,pace?) - Set navigation to escort a passenger to their destination while carrying luggage
- show_map(area,highlight?,show_route?) - Display an interactive airport map on Porter's screen highlighting a specific area
- check_wait_time(queue_type,terminal?) - Check estimated wait time at a queue (security, immigration, check-in)
- set_reminder(flight_number,reminder_minutes_before?) - Set a boarding reminder for the passenger
- get_airline_counter(airline,service_type?) - Find the check-in counter location for a specific airline
- get_transport_options(destination,transport_type?) - Get ground transportation options from the airport to a destination
- translate_text(text,target_language) - Translate text to the passenger's preferred language
- report_incident(incident_type,location,description?,severity) - Report a safety or security incident to airport operations
Excuse me, where am I right now? Show on map. I'm running late!

<tool_call>
{"name": "show_map", "arguments": {"area": "Concourse A", "show_route": true, "highlight": "Food Court"}}
</tool_call>
{"status": "map_displayed", "area": "Concourse A", "highlighted": "Food Court", "route_shown": true}
I've displayed the map of Concourse A on my screen with the route highlighted. You can see the path from our current location. Follow the blue line! Ready to walk there?

<tool_call>
{"name": "show_map", "arguments": {"area": "Arrivals Level 0", "show_route": true, "highlight": "Gate F10"}}
</tool_call>
{"status": "map_displayed", "area": "Arrivals Level 0", "highlighted": "Gate F10", "route_shown": true}
I've displayed the map of Arrivals Level 0 on my screen with the route highlighted. You can see the path from our current location. Follow the blue line! Ready to walk there?

I just went through security. Best way to reach Varanasi centre?

<tool_call>
{"name": "get_transport_options", "arguments": {"destination": "Varanasi", "transport_type": "bus"}}
</tool_call>

{"destination": "Varanasi", "options": [{"type": "taxi", "cost_inr": 800, "time_min": 45, "pickup": "Level 0, Exit 4"}, {"type": "metro", "cost_inr": 100, "time_min": 20, "pickup": "Level -1, Metro Station"}]}
To get to Varanasi, a taxi from Exit 4 costs approximately ₹800 and takes about 45 minutes. Metro is also available (₹100, 20 min). Want me to walk you to the taxi stand?

{"name": "weigh_luggage", "arguments": {"num_bags": 2}}
</tool_call>
{"bags_weighed": 2, "individual_weights_kg": [28.0, 23.7], "total_weight_kg": 51.7}
Your 2 bag(s) weigh 51.7 kg total. That's over the typical 46 kg limit. You might want to redistribute or remove items. The overweight fee is usually ₹400-750 per extra kg.
